schema_id.description: Always 'AssetManifest' for the unified per-locale manifest produced by manifest_merge.py and extended in-place by resolve_assets.py and gen_render_plan.py.

project_id.description: Matches the project directory slug under projects/

episode_id.description: Episode identifier (e.g. s01e02). Together with project_id forms the canonical asset path: projects/{project_id}/episodes/{episode_id}/assets/{locale}/

gender.description: Voice gender for TTS assignment. Always derive explicitly from the story — 'male', 'female', or 'neutral' for non-human/ambiguous voices.

search_prompt.description: 5-10 keywords for free library image search
5-10 keywords for free library image search

ai_prompt_variations.description: Additional AI image generation prompts for the same scene. Each varies one primary visual dimension from ai_prompt (composition, lighting, atmosphere, or tonal emphasis). Same ~2 sentence cinematic format as ai_prompt. The count is controlled solely by p_5_c.txt — currently 2, but can be increased to any N by editing only that prompt file.

search_queries.description: 2–4 diverse query variant strings for multi-query rotation in the media search service. Each query is issued independently; results are deduplicated before trimming to n.

source_filters.description: Per-source native API filter parameters. Keys are source names ('pexels', 'pixabay'). Values are dicts of API params that override the media server's always-on defaults.

pexels.description: Pexels API params: color, orientation, size, locale

pixabay.description: Pixabay API params: category, editors_choice, colors, order

scoring_hints.description: Per-dimension CLIP scoring hints. Each dimension is a list of descriptive text phrases. The media scorer computes CLIP similarity for each phrase and takes the max per dimension.

cinematic_role.description: How this background functions cinematically. Adjusts scorer weight profile: establish→boost environment; hold→boost subjects; transition→boost motion; emotional_support→boost style; atmosphere→boost environment+style.

motion_level.description: Expected amount of visual motion in the background. Maps to a calmness pre-filter threshold: none/very_low=strict (static preferred), medium/high=relaxed (video with movement OK).

lighting.description: Desired lighting quality. Injected as an extra style CLIP sub-prompt during scoring.

include_keywords.description: Terms that MUST appear in asset metadata/tags. Used as post-search filter. Keep short (2–5 terms).

exclude_keywords.description: Terms that must NOT appear in asset metadata/tags. Used as hard-exclude post-search filter.

continuity_hints.description: Shot continuity / sequence ranking hints for the DP sequence ranker. All sub-fields optional. Items sharing the same group_id are ranked jointly to minimise inter-shot visual discontinuity.

group_id.description: Shared identifier for a sequence of shots that should look visually consistent. Items without group_id are treated as singletons.

palette_target.description: Dominant hue hint for colour-continuity scoring.

motion_budget.description: How much motion is acceptable in the sequence.

camera_energy.description: Expected camera movement for the sequence.

allowed_shift.description: Maximum allowed hue-histogram L1 distance between consecutive shots in the group (0.0–1.0, default 0.4).

visual.description: Set to false for VO-only speakers with no visual representation (e.g. disembodied voices). Renderer holds on the current background instead of looking up a character_pack.

start_sec.description: Episode-cumulative start time of this VO item (seconds). Patched by patch_vo_draft_timings.py from vo_preview_approved.{locale}.json after Stage 5. Absent before Stage 3.5 approval.

end_sec.description: Episode-cumulative end time of this VO item (seconds). Patched by patch_vo_draft_timings.py from vo_preview_approved.{locale}.json after Stage 5. Absent before Stage 3.5 approval.

duration_sec.description: Actual spoken duration of this VO item (seconds) = end_sec − start_sec. Patched by patch_vo_draft_timings.py from vo_preview_approved. Replaces estimated_duration_sec as the authoritative timing value after approval.

sfx_items.description: One entry per (shot, sfx_tag) pair. Derived from ShotList.shots[].audio_intent.sfx_tags[]. item_id format: 'sfx-{shot_id}-{NNN}' (NNN zero-padded, e.g. sfx-s01-sh01-001). The tag field is the natural-language description passed to the audio generation model (AudioGen). ShotList.AudioIntent.sfx_item_ids[] references these by item_id.

shot_id.description: The shot this SFX belongs to

tag.description: Natural-language audio description for AudioGen (expanded from ShotList sfx_tags[])

duration_sec.description: Clip duration to generate, matching the shot duration

music_items.description: One entry per shot that has a non-null music_mood in the ShotList. item_id format: 'music-{shot_id}'. The music_mood field is the natural-language description passed to the music generation model (MusicGen). ShotList.AudioIntent.music_item_id references these by item_id.

shot_id.description: The shot this music track belongs to

music_mood.description: Natural-language music direction for MusicGen (from ShotList audio_intent.music_mood)

duration_sec.description: Track duration to generate, matching the shot duration

start_sec.description: Music start time within the shot, in seconds. LLM-authored editorial intent (always 0.0 unless intentionally delayed).

duck_db.description: Music attenuation in dB during VO playback (e.g. -12.0). LLM-authored editorial intent.

fade_sec.description: Linear ramp duration in seconds at each duck interval boundary (e.g. 0.15). LLM-authored editorial intent.

duck_intervals.description: List of [t0, t1] intervals (seconds) during which music is ducked. Computed by manifest_merge.py from VO start_sec/end_sec. Absent in draft manifests.

element_images.description: Per-shot scene element image entries. Each entry describes one physical visual element identified by Stage 5-C from the shot's narration (e.g. reactor core, turbine, control panel). The LLM creates all entries from scratch — no pre-scaffolded count. item_id format: 'el-{shot_id}-{element-slug}' (e.g. 'el-sc01-sh01-reactor-core'). The count per shot (3–5) and variation count are both controlled solely by p_5_c.txt.

item_id.description: Unique identifier. Format: 'el-{shot_id}-{element-slug}' — e.g. 'el-sc01-sh01-reactor-core'. Must be unique across the manifest.

shot_id.description: shot_id from ShotList.shots[] that this element belongs to.

label.description: Human-readable element name. E.g. 'Reactor core — exterior view', 'Coolant pump assembly', 'Control room instrument panel'.

ai_prompt.description: ~2 sentence cinematic description of the element as the primary subject. Focus on the physical object, its materials, textures, lighting, and context. For AI image generation.

ai_prompt_variations.description: Additional variation prompts for the same element, each varying one primary visual dimension (composition, lighting, atmosphere, tonal emphasis). Count controlled solely by p_5_c.txt — same N as backgrounds.

locale_scope.description: Absent or 'monolithic' = legacy flat manifest (all assets + VO in one file). 'shared' = locale-free assets only (character_packs, backgrounds, sfx_items, music_items; no vo_items). 'locale' = VO items and overrides only for one locale. 'merged' = manifest_merge.py output combining shared + locale.

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. 'en', 'zh-Hans'). Required when locale_scope is 'locale' or 'merged'. Absent for shared manifests.

shared_ref.description: Relative path to the shared manifest this locale manifest is paired with. Present only when locale_scope is 'locale'.

background_overrides.description: Locale-specific background video overrides for shots where VO duration exceeds the shared background clip duration. Written by post_tts_analysis.py. Empty array in draft manifests.

timing_lock_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical per-shot duration list used to generate background overrides. Computed per-locale by manifest_merge.py. Used to detect if shared background assets need regeneration.

resolved_assets.description: Resolved asset list written in-place by resolve_assets.py. Empty [] (placeholder) immediately after manifest_merge runs; populated with resolved file:// or placeholder:// URIs after resolve_assets.py runs. Each item describes one asset with its resolved URI, is_placeholder flag, and metadata.

render_plan.description: Render plan written in-place by gen_render_plan.py. null (placeholder) until gen_render_plan.py runs; populated with the full per-shot render plan afterward. Also written separately to RenderPlan.{locale}.json for render_video.py.

SearchFilters.description: Metadata filters applied when querying free libraries (Pexels, Pixabay, Unsplash, Freesound). Fields map directly to API query params or are used to post-filter returned metadata.

orientation.description: Pexels: landscape/portrait/square. Pixabay: horizontal→landscape, vertical→portrait. Unsplash: landscape/portrait/squarish→square.

media_type.description: Pixabay image_type param. Pexels/Unsplash are photo-only; video triggers Pexels video search instead of photo search.

color_mood.description: Mood-based color hint. Media-agent maps to library color params: warm→orange/yellow, cool→blue/turquoise, dark→black/gray, neutral→white/gray, monochrome→grayscale. Pexels and Unsplash support color filtering natively.

min_width.description: Minimum image width in pixels. Maps to Pixabay min_width param; used as post-filter on Pexels/Unsplash width metadata.

min_height.description: Minimum image height in pixels. Maps to Pixabay min_height param; used as post-filter on Pexels/Unsplash height metadata.

min_duration_sec.description: Minimum clip duration in seconds. For Pexels/Pixabay video and Freesound audio. Freesound: maps to filter=duration:[min TO max].

max_duration_sec.description: Maximum clip duration in seconds. For Pexels/Pixabay video and Freesound audio.

category.description: Pixabay category param. Ignored by Pexels/Unsplash but used as keyword hint in those queries.

type.description: camera=camera move only (no characters); idle=character stationary; walk/gesture/fight/interact=character animation

description.description: Human-readable motion description passed to image2video

participants.description: character asset_ids involved; empty for camera-only motion

BackgroundOverrideItem.description: A locale-specific background video clip that replaces the shared background for one shot because the locale VO duration overflows the shared clip.

shot_id.description: The shot this override applies to

duration_sec.description: Required clip duration, equal to total VO duration + buffer for this locale

uri.description: Relative path to the generated override video file, e.g. assets/{locale}/video/bg/bg-override-{shot_id}-{locale}.mp4

description.description: Visual description for the video generation prompt

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag matching the text language, e.g. 'en', 'zh-Hans'

azure_voice.description: Azure TTS voice name, e.g. 'zh-CN-Xiaoxiao:DragonHDFlashLatestNeural' or 'zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural'.

azure_style.description: Azure express-as style name. Must be a style supported by azure_voice. e.g. 'sad', 'excited', 'newscast', 'whispering'. Omit (or null) to suppress express-as entirely. Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json — do NOT invent per-line values.

azure_style_degree.description: Style intensity multiplier. 1.0 = subtle, 2.0 = maximum. Practical range: 1.0–1.8. Default 1.5. Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json.

azure_rate.description: Speech rate override, e.g. '-25%', '0%', '+15%'. Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json.

azure_pitch.description: Pitch shift, e.g. '-10%' (deeper), '+5%' (higher). Typical range: -20% to +20%. Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json.

azure_break_ms.description: Pause inserted after each sentence terminator (ms). 0 = no breaks. Typical: 300–800. Must be 0 when azure_style is 'whispering' (breaks sound robotic). Copied verbatim from VoiceCast.json.
